description: A short LLM-written prose summary of Ethan's coding over the last 7 days, derived from the same GitHub + WakaTime activity. Plain third-person paragraph — quote it directly when summarizing what he's currently working on.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu spent 2 hrs 17 mins coding, with a daily average of 45 mins. His work was split across Java, Bash, and Markdown, and Wakatime shows activity across 4 projects. GitHub activity recorded no commits, new repos, or opened pull requests.
